Notice And Motion For Order Reopening Discovery And For Sancitons
Off Calendar Jul-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.
DEFENDANT HENRY FISHER's Motion for Order Reopening Discovery and for Sanctions is GRANTED. Discovery is ordered reopened for the limited purpose of taking the depositions of the plaintiff Ying Juan Xie (aka Jodie Xie) and defendant David Fisher. Requests by Plaintiff and Defendant for sanctions are DENIED. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. NOT REPORTED.
